task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Genesis GV80 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $57700.00 and wholesale is $46160.00. Product features: Luxury mid-size SUV with 3D digital cluster and premium materials. Reference: https://www.genesis.com/us/en/gv80

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Genesis GV80. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Genesis GV80. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
